blurb_en:
Midjourney — the image AI that has never taken VC — officially unveiled its first hardware product Wednesday at an invite-only event in San Francisco, and announced plans for an AI video model.
• The device is called the Orb, led by Ahmad Abbas (ex-hardware engineering manager on Apple Vision Pro) and David Holz, both former Leap Motion engineers.
• Midjourney described it as 'physically big, ambitious, and unexpected' — revealing nothing beforehand except the invite list and a 6pm PT livestream.
• The company also shared plans for an AI video model, its first product category beyond static images.
• Midjourney has operated without outside investment since 2022; the Orb program may require its first-ever funding round.
• For Insta360 employees: when an AI art company hires the Vision Pro hardware lead and starts building physical devices, it is entering the same market where AI capabilities and cameras converge.
• Five years of printing money without investors means Midjourney gets to take a genuinely weird swing at hardware without asking permission.
blurb_zh:
从未接受风险投资的AI艺术公司Midjourney周三在旧金山发布首款硬件产品，并宣布AI视频模型计划。
• 设备名为Orb，由前苹果Vision Pro硬件工程经理Ahmad Abbas与Leap Motion联合创始人David Holz主导。
• Midjourney形容该设备「体量大、野心大、出人意料」，在晚上6点发布前对外保密。
• 公司同时披露AI视频模型计划，首次将产品线从静态图像扩展至视频。
• Midjourney自2022年起就没有接受任何外部投资；Orb项目可能是其首次融资的开端。
• 对Insta360员工而言：一家AI艺术公司招募Vision Pro硬件团队并开始建造实体设备，正在进入AI能力与摄影硬件融合的赛道。
verification_notes: The Decoder confirmed 'officially launches Orb hardware project.' Launch event June 17 6pm PT, San Francisco. Ahmad Abbas (ex-Apple Vision Pro) as head of hardware confirmed via multiple sources including The Decoder and mindstudio.ai. Specific device functionality not yet fully detailed in available post-event coverage as reveal was at 6pm PT June 17.

blurb_en:
For the first time since launch, ChatGPT's share of the global AI assistant market fell below 50 percent — to 46.4 percent — according to Sensor Tower's State of AI 2026 report published Monday.
• Google's Gemini reached 27.7 percent; Anthropic's Claude climbed to 10.3 percent.
• ChatGPT still has 1.1 billion monthly active users — Gemini follows at 662 million, Claude at 245 million.
• Claude's US audience share jumped from 4.4 percent to nearly 14 percent year-on-year; global user base grew 452 percent over the same period.
• Sensor Tower noted a spike in US ChatGPT uninstalls immediately after OpenAI announced its Department of Defense partnership.
• ChatGPT, Gemini, and DeepSeek together still account for nearly 90 percent of total time spent on AI assistant apps.
• ChatGPT is still the world's most-used AI assistant by a wide margin; this story is about the gap narrowing, not the throne changing.
blurb_zh:
Sensor Tower《2026 AI行业现状报告》显示，ChatGPT全球AI助手市场占有率首次跌破50%，降至46.4%。
• Google Gemini升至27.7%，Anthropic Claude升至10.3%。
• 按用户量，ChatGPT仍领先：月活11亿，Gemini 6.62亿，Claude 2.45亿。
• Claude全球用户同比增长452%，美国市占率从4.4%升至约14%。
• 报告指出，OpenAI宣布与美国国防部合作后，美国用户卸载ChatGPT的数量明显上升。
• ChatGPT、Gemini与DeepSeek三家合计仍占AI应用使用时长的近九成。
• ChatGPT仍是全球最多人使用的AI助手，这个故事讲的是差距在缩小，而不是王座在易主。
verification_notes: Sensor Tower State of AI 2026 report, June 16. Confirmed via TechCrunch, Business Standard, Fast Company, TechTimes, Medianama — all citing the same Sensor Tower data. Numbers (46.4%, 27.7%, 10.3%, 1.1B/662M/245M MAU, 452% Claude growth) consistent across 6+ sources.

blurb_en:
Snap unveiled consumer-grade augmented reality glasses called Specs on Tuesday at the Augmented World Expo, priced at $2,195 — about three times the cost of Meta's Ray-Ban Smart Glasses.
• Dual Qualcomm Snapdragon chips: one for computer vision and spatial tracking, one for AR rendering — 7ms motion-to-photon latency.
• LCoS display, 51-degree field of view, 16 million colors — overlays navigation, real-time translation, and object recognition in your field of vision.
• CEO Evan Spiegel called it the start of the post-smartphone era. Snap's stock fell on the announcement.
• Pre-orders open for a $200 refundable deposit; fall delivery in the US, UK, and France.
• For Insta360 employees: AI-driven computer vision in a wearable device is exactly the product direction worth watching. At $2,195, 'early adopter' is doing a lot of work.
blurb_zh:
Snap在增强现实博览会上发布消费级AR眼镜Specs，定价2195美元——约为Meta Ray-Ban智能眼镜的三倍。
• 搭载双Snapdragon芯片：一颗负责计算机视觉与空间跟踪，一颗负责AR渲染，运动到光子延迟7毫秒。
• LCoS显示屏，51度视场角，1600万色，支持导航叠加、实时翻译与物件识别。
• CEO Evan Spiegel将其定义为「后智能手机时代的开端」。发布当日Snap股价下跌。
• 现已开放预订，需付200美元可退款押金，秋季在美英法三国发货。
• 对Insta360员工：AI驱动计算机视觉的可穿戴硬件，正是公司需要密切关注的产品方向。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNBC, MacRumors (June 16), Road to VR, Wareable, 9to5Google, official Snap newsroom (newsroom.snap.com/introducing-specs-augmented-reality-glasses) and investor.snap.com press release. Price ($2,195), specs (dual Snapdragon, LCoS, 51-degree FOV, 7ms latency), and availability all consistent across 6+ sources.

blurb_en:
The CEOs of OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind joined G7 leaders for a working lunch Wednesday in Evian, France — the first time AI company chiefs have been formally seated alongside heads of state at a G7 summit.
• Sam Altman (OpenAI), Dario Amodei (Anthropic), and Demis Hassabis (DeepMind) were among approximately a dozen tech leaders at the table.
• Agenda: frontier AI risks in the cyber and biological domains, AI infrastructure and sovereignty, and child safety online.
• OpenAI's chief global affairs officer said tech firms are expected to leave with a package of voluntary commitments.
• The meeting came days after the US government issued a national security order restricting Anthropic's Fable 5, then reversed it — giving 'frontier AI risks' a very recent context at the table.
• CNBC's framing: 'A signal of where power sits.'
blurb_zh:
周三，OpenAI、Anthropic与Google DeepMind的CEO在法国埃维昂与G7各国首脑共进工作午餐——这是AI公司高管首次正式入席G7峰会。
• 参与者包括Sam Altman、Dario Amodei、Demis Hassabis及其他约十名科技领袖。
• 议题：网络与生物领域前沿AI风险、AI基础设施与主权、青少年网络安全。
• OpenAI首席全球事务官表示，预计各方将签署一揽子自愿承诺文件。
• 此次峰会恰逢美国政府针对Anthropic Fable 5发出安全限制令随后撤回——「前沿AI风险」有了极为具体的现实注脚。
• CNBC的定性更直接：「权力所在之处的信号」。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNBC (June 17), The Hill, The Next Web (thenextweb.com/news/g7-ai-summit-altman-amodei-hassabis), QZ (qz.com/openai-google-deepmind-anthropic-ceos-g7-france-061226). CEOs named consistently across all sources. Voluntary commitments per OpenAI's own statement.
